ai:cl.c: Acts as a proxy for decompressing and compressing data streams between objects.

ai:a.c: Decompress data from the input stream and write it to the supplied buffer.

ai:i.c: A mutable buffer that will receive the data.
The Read action will write this parameter with the total number of bytes read into the Buffer.

ai:a.c: Reset the state of the stream.
For use in decompressing streams only. Seeks to a position within the stream.
ai:a.p: ERR acSeek(*Object, DOUBLE Offset, INT Position)

ai:i.c: The desired offset to seek to, relative to the Position parameter.
The position that defines the starting point for Offset.

ai:a.c: Compress raw data in a buffer and write it to the Output object.
ai:a.p: ERR acWrite(*Object, std::span<const int8_t> Buffer, INT *Result)

ai:i.c: A buffer containing the data that will be written to the object.
This parameter with be updated with the total number of bytes written from the Buffer.

ai:f.c: The format of the compressed stream. The default is GZIP.
An input object that will supply data for decompression.
A target object that will receive data compressed by the stream.
The uncompressed size of the input source, if known.
A live counter of total bytes that have been output by the stream.
